items.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Product in report does not match booked product. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.
Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: SKU or reference order mismatch with booking. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

preliminary.product_matches_booking.requirement: Product inspected must match what was booked.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Evidence suggests inspection was performed in IAPP instead of QIMAone. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

preliminary.qimaone_platform.requirement: Inspection must be performed in QIMAone, never IAPP.

items.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Chinese characters in supplier or factory name. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.
Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Only one of supplier or factory name is filled. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.
Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Format is not combined Supplier (Factory). Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

cover.supplier_factory_name.requirement: Supplier and Factory names must be in English, combined format: Supplier Name (Factory Name). Both fields filled.

items.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Product name is mostly digits or barcode. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.
Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Product name equals SKU. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Booking name looks like barcode while QSP product name exists in Additional Fields. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

cover.product_name_not_sku.requirement: Product name must be the real product name, not SKU or barcode string.

then.question: Does photo content satisfy this requirement? Cover photo must show Consumer Pack, frontal angle, vertical orientation, full product name readable.

cover.cover_photo.requirement: Cover photo must show Consumer Pack, frontal angle, vertical orientation, full product name readable.

items.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: PO field blank. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.
Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: PO field contains comment instead of N/A when PO not found. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

cover.po_number.requirement: If no PO on site, field must be N/A with no additional comment.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: All three cover date fields show N/A but replacement sentence is absent. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

cover.date_code_all_na_replacement.requirement: If MFG, EXP, and Batch are all N/A on cover, replace with: Refer to the individual batch/date code in the date code check section

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Chinese characters in location field. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

cover.location_english.requirement: Location must be written entirely in English.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Unit field shows Other. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

cover.unit_not_other.requirement: Unit must not display Other. Use actual unit from booking (typically Boxes or Packs).

items.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Overall result contradicts checklist findings or defects. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.
Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Result is Pending or Failed but Important Remarks do not explain why. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

cover.result_matches_body.requirement: Cover/overall result must match findings in report body.

items.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: PASS assigned but failures, beyond AQL, or inconsistencies exist. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.
Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: PENDING triggers present but result is PASS or FAIL. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.
Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: FAIL triggers present but result is PASS or PENDING. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

result.overall_logic.requirement: Overall result must follow DFI Pass/Pending/Fail/Missing logic.

result.adhesive_fail_is_pending.requirement: Adhesive test fail (printing unreadable) must yield Pending, never Fail.

items.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Produced quantity below ordered but result is PASS. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.
Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Packed quantity below ordered but result is PASS. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.
Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Quantity table says 100% packed but products.packedQuantity is lower. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

result.pass_quantity_threshold.requirement: For PASS: finished quantity >= ordered AND packed quantity >= ordered.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Below 100% finished or 80% packed but result is PASS. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

result.pending_quantity_threshold.requirement: Quantity on site < 100% finished OR < 80% packed should trigger Pending.

items.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: GSS absent or unavailable but result is PASS. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.
Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: GSS expired but result is PASS. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

result.pending_gss_issues.requirement: No GSS, expired GSS, or GSS inconsistent with bulk should trigger Pending.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Adhesive unreadable but result is PASS. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

result.pending_adhesive_unreadable.requirement: Adhesive test failed with unreadable printing should trigger Pending.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Factory refusal or missing tools noted but result is PASS. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

result.pending_factory_refusal.requirement: Factory refused drop test, did not provide tools, or test could not be completed → Pending.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Measurement failure evident but result is PASS or PENDING. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Non-adhesive test failed but result is PASS or PENDING. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

result.fail_test_except_adhesive.requirement: Any onsite test failed except adhesive → Fail.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Mandatory result statement missing or vague. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

remarks.mandatory_result_statement.requirement: Remark required: The inspection result is [Passed/Pending/Failed] due to [reason].

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Defects or failures found but factory presentation not mentioned. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

remarks.defects_presented_to_factory.requirement: Remark required: All defective items and failure findings are presented to the factory.

when.question: Does this report match the condition 'product_type' = 'health_supplement' for this rule to apply?

remarks.tolerance_health_product.requirement: For health product weight checks: remark must state tolerance range regardless of pass/fail.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Dimension measurement with tolerance but range not stated in remark. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

remarks.tolerance_dimension.requirement: For dimension checks with tolerance: remark must state tolerance range.

when.question: Does this report match the condition 'adhesive_date_code_exemption' = True for this rule to apply?

remarks.adhesive_date_code_waiver.requirement: If adhesive test waived on date code area (Appendix A products): required waiver remark.

remarks.carton_drop_observation.requirement: Carton drop test with findings must describe exactly what was observed using required formats.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Defect found during quantity/dimension check but no separate remark with section name. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

remarks.defect_outside_workmanship.requirement: Defect found outside workmanship stage must be described separately in remarks.

when.question: Does this report match the condition 'multiple_batches' = True for this rule to apply?

remarks.multiple_batches.requirement: Multiple batches: all batch codes found must be mentioned in remarks.

when.question: Does this report match the condition 'no_calibration_record' = True for this rule to apply?

remarks.no_calibration_noted.requirement: If no calibration record for tools, note explicitly without impacting result.

when.question: Does this report match the condition 'factory_internal_calibration' = True for this rule to apply?

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Chinese characters in remarks. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

remarks.no_chinese.requirement: No Chinese characters in remarks (except Chinese date codes recorded exactly as printed elsewhere).

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Vague statements like some issues found without specifics. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

remarks.not_vague.requirement: Remarks must be specific, not vague.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Remark says passed but overall is Failed/Pending or vice versa. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

remarks.match_overall_result.requirement: Result stated in remark must match overall inspection result.

when.question: Does this report match the condition 'result_in' = ['PENDING', 'FAILED', 'FAIL'] for this rule to apply?

remarks.pending_fail_reason.requirement: Pending or Failed reports must state reason explicitly.

then.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Sampling level in report does not match DFI Sampling Plan. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

standards.sampling_level_match.requirement: Sampling levels must match DFI Sampling Plan Excel.

items.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: Checked number does not match sampling plan. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.

when.question: Does this report match the condition 'multiple_batches' = True for this rule to apply?

items.question: Does the report evidence clearly show this failing condition? Condition: GSS not physically on site. Answer true only with clear contradicting evidence.
